sections_1.name: WW DS23 MP Noodles Station Lunch Monday
The Chefs Table Lunch F Sa WW

items.name: Mexican Fruit Cup
items.description: cubed fresh fruit / tropical fruit / chamoy / tajin

items.name: Chocolate Fondue Plate
items.description: warm chocolate ganache/ strawberries/ bananas/ blackberries/pretzels/ pound cake/ oreo cookies/ marshmallows

items.name: Spring Cooler
items.description: watermelon / lime /agave / orange syrup / strawberry sparkling water

items.qp_name: Double Chocolate Cake with Honeycomb Crunch
items.name: Double Chocolate Cake  Honeycomb Crunch
Build Your Own Mediterranean Bowl
items.description: choice of lamb kebab, tandoori chicken, grilled halloumi cheese or falafel with citrus aioli, bell peppers, olives, feta cheese, pickled onion, artichoke hearts, cucumbers, tomatoes, pita chips, lavash, naan, hummus, tzatziki, tabbouleh, lettuce, aru

items.name: BYO Macro Bowl
items.description: choice of grilled flank steak / honey garlic shrimp / gochujang fried tofu with wheatberries / quinoa / brown rice / arugula / roasted broccoli & asparagus / butternut squash / tamari-kale  / avocado green-goddess dressing / creamy sesame-miso dressing

items.name: The Wing Bar
items.description: fried chicken wings with choice of buffalo sauce / gochujang BBQ and sweet chili sauce with sides of potato chips / celery sticks / carrot sticks / ranch dressing / furikake / green onions / mixed greens

items.name: Shanghai Lunch Combo
items.description: choice of veggie chow mein or fried rice / beef and broccoli / orange chicken / hoisin fried tofu / stir fried veggies / crispy spring rolls / green salad with sesame dressing

items.qp_name: The Chefs Table Lunch - Specials M 1
items.name: The Chefs Table Lunch - Specials M 2
